author: Vsevolod Kolganov
description: Earcon integration map for T-Bot zero-UI banking interface

ear_listen_v1.name: Listen / Inhale
ear_listen_v1.description: Short rising tone indicating the system is ready to listen

ear_processing_loop_v1.name: Processing Pulse
ear_processing_loop_v1.description: Low-frequency pulse replacing dead silence during AI processing

ear_success_v1.name: Success Quint
ear_success_v1.description: Major fifth chord representing successful financial action

ear_error_v1.name: Error Tone
ear_error_v1.description: Short descending dissonant tone indicating failure

ear_tx_small_v1.name: Money Transfer Whoosh
ear_tx_small_v1.description: Soft directional whoosh sound representing outgoing transfer

ear_privacy_low_v1.name: Privacy Low Balance
ear_privacy_low_v1.description: Minimal texture indicating low balance in privacy mode

ear_privacy_mid_v1.name: Privacy Medium Balance
ear_privacy_mid_v1.description: Medium density sound texture for balance indication

ear_privacy_high_v1.name: Privacy High Balance
ear_privacy_high_v1.description: Dense harmonic texture representing high balance
